'''''The Phantom Menace''''' was an expansion card pack made for the [[Star Wars Trading Card Game]] based on [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']] and elements of the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]] in the [[Rise of the Empire era]]. The expansion symbol is that for the Prequel era.

The expansion was released in [[July 2]], [[2004]]<ref name="rel" /> and contains 90 cards including rare premium foiled versions of all cards in the set.

==Gameplay==
===New abilities===
*'''Lucky''': each attack, you may reroll a Lucky unit's attack dice or have your opponent reroll attack dice against it

===Card types===
*Battle: 7
*Character: 31
*Ground: 20
*Location: 12
*Mission: 6
*Space: 14
